name: hero-v8-sample-a-16x9
prompt: Create a premium Surnex homepage hero image. Use the attached anchor image only as a style anchor, not as something to paste or copy literally. UI-first, premium and elegant, dark modular product surfaces, controlled lime signal flow, realistic left-sidebar feel, KPI rows, dark dashboard cards, charts, tables, realistic product rhythm, closer to real software layout language, cleaner than the anchor, simpler hierarchy, expensive B2B SaaS feel, product shown as a beautiful system. Wide cinematic 16:9 composition with one dominant focal cluster and clear copy-safe space. No readable text. No fake UI labels. No logo. No wordmark. No generic AI wallpaper. No fantasy abstractions. Output image only.
